messages.subject: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body_text:
Hi Maria,

Welcome to Vectrix! Really glad we got the paperwork across the finish line this week.

I'm setting up your organization in the system today. A few things to get you started:

1. SDK install guide: https://docs.vectrix.io/quickstart
2. Marcus Webb (our CTO) is CC'd here — he's available for any technical setup questions.
3. Attached is your enterprise onboarding agenda for our kickoff call January 14.

Looking forward to working with you.

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body_text:
Hi Tessa,

Good kickoff call today. SDK is installed and we're seeing events come in — setup was faster than expected.

One thing I want to flag: we specifically chose Vectrix in part because we were told comparison mode (week-over-week endpoint performance) was coming in the v2 dashboard. If that feature is deferred or descoped, I need to know now — it affects how I plan our Q1 reliability review with engineering leadership.

Can you confirm the timeline?

— Maria Chen
VP Engineering, Cascade Systems
maria.chen@cascadesystems.io
messages.body_html:

If that feature is deferred or descoped, I need to know now — it affects how I plan our Q1 reliability review with engineering leadership.

Can you confirm the timeline?

— Maria Chen
VP Engineering, Cascade Systems
maria.chen@cascadesystems.io
messages.signature:
Maria Chen
VP Engineering, Cascade Systems
maria.chen@cascadesystems.io

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body_text:
Hi Maria,

Thank you for raising this directly — I want to give you a straight answer.

Comparison mode is in our Dashboard v2 roadmap. I'm looping in Dana Reeves (our Head of Product, CC'd) who can give you the specific timeline and scope. Dana — can you send Maria the v2 launch target and where comparison mode sits?

Maria — I can commit that if the timeline shifts in a way that materially affects your Q1 planning, you'll hear from me directly before it's announced elsewhere.

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body_text:
Hi Maria,

I'm Dana, Head of Product. Comparison mode — week-over-week and custom date range comparison — is confirmed in the Dashboard v2 scope. Target launch is late February / early March. It's one of our top three features for the release alongside saved views and the core layout redesign.

I'll make sure you're among the first to know when we lock the final date.

Welcome aboard — we're glad to have Cascade as a reference customer.

— Dana Reeves
Head of Product, Vectrix Labs
dana@vectrix.io
